speaker: speaker1
text: Do you use an anti-virus program to protect your computer ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I do . I also use an anti-spyware program and a firewall . There are so many nasties on the internet and so many people who are trying to use the internet to hurt other users . You have to be very c

speaker: speaker1
text: How often do you run your anti-virus program ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I usually run it every few days . It finds a virus about half the time .

speaker: speaker1
text: Which anti-virus program would you recommend ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Have you tried this one ? It ’ s very good and you can download it for free on the internet . You can also download updates for free .

speaker: speaker1
text: That sounds very good . Which website should I visit to download it ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Just a minute ... go to this one . I ’ ll send you an email with the line in it . It only takes a few minutes to download . Then you have to go through the set up procedures . But they are not complicated .

speaker: speaker1
text: What do you use your computer for ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I use it for several things-surfing the net , word processing and creating presentations . I don ’ t play many games on my computer , but I do a lot of work with photographs . Using a computer program , you

speaker: speaker1
text: Computers are great , aren ’ t they ? I should download some programs and learn how to use them .
